services.title: Twelve specialties, one philosophy of care.
services.subtitle: From preventive check-ups to advanced implantology, every treatment is delivered with safe protocols, certified materials and an obsessive focus on patient comfort.
services.askHint: Call the reception of your nearest clinic to learn more or book an appointment.

team.title: Specialists who listen first.
team.subtitle: Eleven professionals with international training and shared protocols across our three clinics.

contact.title: Speak with our team.
contact.body: You can reach us by phone at each clinic or send us an email. We will reply within one working day.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.body: DentalIA is a demonstration brand operated by Follow The Flow AI LLC, a Delaware limited liability company. The clinics, treatments and team profiles shown on this site are fictional and for illustrative purposes only.

privacy.title: Privacy notice
privacy.body: Because DentalIA is a public demo, no real visitor data is collected, stored or shared. The full privacy policy will be published with any production launch by a real dental clinic adopting this platform.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.body: All services, clinics and team members presented on this site are demonstrations and do not correspond to real medical providers. No real medical service is offered. Full terms will accompany any production rollout.

home.heroEyebrow: Your dental health, in expert hands
home.heroSubtitle: From routine check-ups to advanced implantology, boutique dental care designed to feel calm, comfortable and pain-free.
home.valuePropsTitle: Comfort, technology and prevention at the heart.
home.servicesBody: Browse our full catalogue, from yearly check-ups to aesthetic and conservative treatments our patients ask for the most.
home.clinicsBody: Rome, Palma de Mallorca, London. Same protocols, same philosophy of care.
home.teamTitle: Specialists who listen first, then treat.
home.teamBody: Implantologists, orthodontists, periodontists, hygienists and pediatric dentists. Eleven specialists with international training and shared protocols.
home.firstVisitTitle: Your first check-up is on us.
home.firstVisitBody: Come meet us with no commitment. A 30-minute preliminary visit to assess the health of your smile and, if needed, plan a personalised treatment path. Free of charge, no strings attached.

valueProps.title: Pain-free care
valueProps.body: Computer-controlled anaesthesia, tailored analgesic protocols and conscious sedation on request. Visits and procedures are designed to feel as comfortable as possible, even for anxious patients.

valueProps.title: Digital technology
valueProps.body: Low-dose 3D X-rays, intraoral scanners and a fully digital workflow. More precise diagnoses, faster treatments, and no traditional impressions.

valueProps.title: Personalised prevention
valueProps.body: Professional hygiene, sealants, yearly check-ups and maintenance plans tailored to you. Protecting your smile over time costs far less than treating it.

valueProps.title: Clear pricing, 5-year guarantee
valueProps.body: A written, detailed quote before any treatment starts. Five-year guarantee on implants and prosthetics, with flexible payment plans available.

meta.title: DentalIA — Boutique Dental Clinics in Rome, Palma and London
meta.description: DentalIA: three boutique dental clinics in Rome, Palma de Mallorca and London. Twelve specialties, free first visit, five-year guarantee on implants and prosthetics.

footer.tagline: DentalIA — Boutique dental clinics. Rome · Palma · London.
footer.legalNote: DentalIA is a demonstration brand. All clinics, treatments and team members shown on this site are fictitious and for illustrative purposes only.
